Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Integrate PRD wireframe into full-stack app with Denim City theme

Decompose the standalone PRD.html into TypeScript React components using
Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui, wired into the Vite + Express scaffold via wouter.

- Replace all placeholder CSS variables with Denim City HSL palette
- Add 16 new files: types, constants, defaults, storage, state hook,
  10 components \(editable-text, annotations, blocks, views, toolbar, sidebar\),
  and the PRD page
- Reorganize site structure: activity-based navigation \(Store, Education,
  Lab & Atelier, Tours, Collaborate, About, Contact\), with Individuals
  and Companies & Schools as audience landing pages nested under Home
- Store split into Brands, Collabs, Fabrics, Repair & Customization, Made to Order
- Education consolidates Academy, Incubator, Jean School, Archive, Library
- Lab & Atelier restructured: Sustainable Laundry R&D, Prototyping,
  Capsule Collections, Made-to-Order, Custom Made Products
- Press updated with press releases and downloadable imagery
- Homepage follows Model 3 \(Vitra/Design Museum pattern\): universal for
  all visitors, no B2C/B2B routing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(ls -la /home/runner/workspace/.env* 2>/dev/null || echo "No .env files found in root")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('/home/runner/workspace/client/src/lib/prd-defaults.ts', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Extract all page definitions
page_pattern = r'{\\s*id:"\([^"]+\)",\\s*label:"\([^"]+\)",\\s*nav:\(true|false\),\\s*parent:\(null|"[^"]+"\)'
pages = re.findall\(page_pattern, content\)

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("PAGES IN PRD"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
for page_id, label, nav, parent in pages:
    nav_str = "✓ Nav" if nav == "true" else "  Hidden"
    parent_str = f"\(Parent: {parent}\)" if parent != "null" else ""
    print\(f"{page_id:25} | {label:30} | {nav_str} {parent_str}"\)

print\(f"\\nTotal pages: {len\(pages\)}"\)
EOF)
